title: Implement Throttle
input_format: A function `fn` and an interval in milliseconds `interval`
output_format: A throttled version of the function that invokes `fn` at most once per `interval` ms
example_output: A function that calls fn at most once every 300ms
constraints: 0 <= interval <= 10000, fn is a valid function
function_signature: function throttle(fn: (...args: any[]) => void, interval: number): (...args: any[]) => void
